offer: For property managers processing 5–15 properties/month, manual tracking causes late filings, leading to penalties. We automate compliance filings instead of manual tracking and filing of property taxes.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on property management tools
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for property management
try_it: Let users try data entry for property details and reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy reuse
Set default reminder schedules for compliance
Allow CSV import for existing property data
Enable one-click export of compliance reports
